title: GateState
description: Runtime gate state for a single project session. Created by /gate-review on first use, read by /new-project, /workflow, /sprint-ceremony, /gate-review.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent write to this file

schema_version.description: Schema version for forward compatibility. Must be '1.0' for this schema.

gate_1_intent_review.description: Gate 1: Intent Review (P-004). Owner: Product Manager + Engineering Manager. 7 checklist items.

gate_2_scope_lock.description: Gate 2: Scope Lock (P-013). Owner: Product Manager. 8 checklist items.

gate_3_dependency_acceptance.description: Gate 3: Dependency Acceptance (P-019). Owner: Technical Program Manager. 6 checklist items.

gate_4_sprint_readiness.description: Gate 4: Sprint Readiness (P-025). Owner: Engineering Manager + Tech Lead. 6 checklist items.

status.description: Current gate status. Valid transitions: pending→in_review, in_review→passed, in_review→failed, failed→in_review, passed→in_review (--reopen only). Invalid: pending→passed, pending→failed, passed→failed, passed→pending.

owner.description: Role or person responsible for gate passage

checklist_items_total.description: Total number of checklist items for this gate

checklist_items_passed.description: Number of checklist items confirmed passed in the last review

last_reviewed.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent gate review. Null if gate has never been reviewed.

reviewed_by.description: Identity of the agent or user who performed the most recent review. Null if never reviewed.

pass_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when gate status became 'passed'. Null if not yet passed.

fail_reason.description: Human-readable reason for gate failure. Required when status is 'failed'. Null otherwise.

override.description: Authorized gate override. When non-null, enforcement is waived for this gate only.

reason.description: Detailed justification for the override. Must be at least 10 characters.

authorized_by.description: Name or role of the person who authorized this override

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the override was authorized
